title: SURVEY-Viewpoints.md and SURVEY-Viewpoints.html duplicate -- archive .md source
description: ~README.md/ contains both SURVEY-Viewpoints.md and SURVEY-Viewpoints.html. The .html is the canonical rendered form; the .md source is a documentation artifact but not actively read by any tool or agent. Per T0/T3 hierarchy, .md sources for rendered HTML files are T3 (deprecated). Archive SURVEY-Viewpoints.md to ~REPORTS/archive/ and update any links that reference it to point to the .html version.
notes: Verify no agent or script imports SURVEY-Viewpoints.md before archiving. Use: Select-String -Path **/*.ps1,**/*.psm1 -Pattern 'SURVEY-Viewpoints.md' to check.
